hero.eyebrow: Software Engineer · Full Stack Web Developer
hero.intro: I build web products with Angular, Java, Spring Boot, microservices, cloud workflows, and delivery discipline. Based in Bariloche, I work across code, architecture, planning, and execution.
hero.focusCopy: Frontend, backend, data, estimation, and execution in the same loop.
hero.locationCopy: Available for remote collaboration and product-focused delivery.

items.description: Leading delivery across web initiatives, designing end-to-end applications, and aligning technical execution with planning and team coordination.

items.role: Full Stack Web Developer / Technical Lead
items.description: Building dynamic websites and web applications, maintaining microservices and databases, and working directly with clients on scope, estimates, and delivery.
Implemented frontend and backend features with a strong focus on usability, delivery planning, and cross-team execution.
Worked on backend functionality, legacy system maintenance, and cloud-oriented engineering with microservices and CI/CD workflows.

services.title: Hands-on engineering with ownership beyond implementation.
